rationale: The real estate maintenance dashboard requires a clean, authoritative, and trustworthy aesthetic. A minimal dark theme with mid-green accents reduces eye strain for maintenance staff and provides a premium 'control room' feel for the property owner. The green is reserved for active states, key CTAs, and success metrics.

headings.usage: Used for all page titles, card headers, and major numbers. Tracking should be tight (-0.02em).

body.usage: Used for all forms, tables, ticket contents, and standard UI elements.

background.description: Deep slate/navy black for the main app background to provide depth without being pure black.

surface.description: Elevated panels and cards. Primary surface is for standard cards, secondary for hover states or nested elements.

accent.description: Mid-green. Used strictly for primary CTAs (e.g., 'New Ticket', 'Mark Resolved'), active navigation states, and success indicators.

text.description: High contrast off-white for primary readability, muted slate for secondary metadata.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid (Mode B). Strict alignment, tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) for dashboards. Dense, data-heavy approach for the Admin view.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use standard Tailwind spacing but generously pad containers (p-6 or p-8) that have borders.
layout_and_spacing.cards: Flat solid surfaces. 1px border (border-slate-800). Max 8px border-radius (rounded-lg). Do not use drop shadows in dark mode; rely on border contrast.
layout_and_spacing.navigation: Sticky sidebar for Desktop (Admin), bottom navigation or condensed hamburger menu for Mobile (Tenant/Maintenance).

component_rules.buttons: Flat design. Primary buttons use the mid-green accent with dark text (text-slate-950). Secondary buttons use transparent background with 1px border.
component_rules.forms: Use Shadcn Form components. Inputs should have bg-slate-900 with subtle borders. Focus states must ring with mid-green.
component_rules.tables: Admin tenant/unit views use Shadcn Table. No vertical borders. Generous row padding.
component_rules.status_badges: Open (Yellow/Amber: #F59E0B), In Progress (Blue: #3B82F6), Resolved (Green: #10B981). Badges use 15% opacity background with solid text color.
component_rules.ticket_images: Image gallery inside tickets must use rounded corners (rounded-md) and open in a full-screen modal/lightbox on click.

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract dark minimal background with mid-green gradient. Use for the login screen background.

illustrations.description: Minimalist clipboard/wrench illustration for empty ticket lists.

placeholders.description: Modern apartment building exterior. Use for Unit or Property placeholders.
Plumber fixing sink. Use as dummy data for tenant ticket photo uploads.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, tabs, ticket cards) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='submit-ticket-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Tailwind for dark mode by default.
Add 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'Manrope' fonts via Google Fonts or Fontshare.
Install Phosphor Icons or Lucide-react for sharp, clean iconography.
Ensure the login page uses the provided abstract green background.
Admin dashboard needs pure CRUD tables for users and units.
Ticket views must have a distinct split between the issue details/photos and the comment thread.
Remember to apply 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms.
